article_title: Claude Code Skills：把重复工作流封装成一条命令
core_theme: 用 SKILL.md 格式在 Claude Code 中创建可复用的 AI 工作流技能，替代粘贴重复 prompt 的习惯
reader_takeaway: 能写出一个有效的 SKILL.md，让 Claude 自动或手动执行可重复工作流，并知道如何设置权限、参数和子 agent
summary_angle: 从一堆散落的 Notion prompt 片段，到一个 /skill-name 命令就能触发完整流程 —— SKILL.md 是让 AI 工作流可版本化、可共享的关键

information_blocks.source_anchor: Anyone who uses Claude Code seriously ends up with a graveyard of prompts. A long block in a Notion page for scaffolding a new ASP.NET Core endpoint.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：散落的 prompt 文本片段，标注「漂移」

information_blocks.source_anchor: A skill is a reusable Markdown file that Claude Code loads on demand as part of its prompt. You write instructions in a SKILL.md file, give it a name, and invoke it with /skill-name
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：SKILL.md 文件作为核心主体，箭头指向 /command 触发

information_blocks.source_anchor: dotnet-claude-kit ships 47 skills covering architectures, runtime patterns, observability, infrastructure
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：整齐排列的工具图标组，标注数字 47

information_blocks.source_anchor: context: fork to run in an isolated subagent with its own context window
information_blocks.visual_idea: 底部：fork 符号，表示子 agent 隔离执行

main_metaphor: 工具库 —— 从散落的零件到整齐上架的工具架
primary_subject: 一个 SKILL.md 文件，从中发出分支箭头连接到多个工作流步骤
subject_action: SKILL.md 作为枢纽，向外辐射连接 scaffold、review、migration 等任务
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 随机从 40 项风格池中选中。游戏原画风的「英雄主体突出 + 环境叙事」特质，适合呈现 SKILL.md 作为工具库核心的角色感，画面信息层次清晰，符合教程类封面要求。
style_safety_note: 游戏原画风无强指向特定品牌、工作室或艺术家，直接使用原描述词，无需改写。
draft_goal: 验证「SKILL.md 作为工具库枢纽」的主隐喻是否清晰，信息块布局是否可读，游戏原画风格是否呈现出来
revision_targets: 如果 SKILL.md 主体不够突出，增加光源集中在文件上
如果风格偏向普通 editorial，加强 concept art 细节质感
如果文字标签不可读，缩减至 2 个
final_prompt:
Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail. Editorial technical illustration style.

Scene: A dark deep-blue tech workspace. CENTER: A glowing SKILL.md file document as the hero object, emanating branching arrows to 3-4 workflow nodes (scaffold / review / migrate). LEFT SIDE: faded scattered prompt text fragments labeled '漂移' suggesting disorder. RIGHT SIDE: a clean numbered grid of 47 tool icons, with a small chip reading '47 skills'. BOTTOM: a fork-branch symbol with label 'context: fork' indicating subagent isolation.

Colors: deep navy #1a2744 background, golden highlight #f5a623 on the hero SKILL.md, cool white #e8ecf4 for arrows and nodes, accent orange-red #e84c3d for one workflow node.

Allowed visible text (3 items only): '漂移' as a faded label on left, 'SKILL.md' on the hero file, '47 skills' on the right grid chip. No other text.

No: fake terminal output, no fake dashboard, no fake chart axes, no generic robot figure, no cyberpunk neon pollution, no floating decorative chips, no watermark, no English slogans.
